results.LLM code:
def process_graph(graph_data):
  graph_copy = graph_data.copy()
  graph_copy.remove_node(graph_data.nodes(name='ju1.a4.m3.s2c4'))
  child_nodes = [node for node in graph_copy.nodes() if graph_copy.has_edge(source='ju1.a4.m3.s2c4', target=node[0])]
  sorted_child_nodes = sorted(child_nodes, key=lambda node: sum([graph_copy.nodes(name=child)[0]['physical_capacity_bps'] for child in graph_copy.successors(node)]), reverse=True)
  return_object = {
    'type': 'list',
    'data': [(node, sum([graph_copy.nodes(name=child)[0]['physical_capacity_bps'] for child in graph_copy.successors(node)])) for node in sorted_child_nodes],
    'updated_graph': nx.readwrite.json_graph.node_link_data(graph_copy)
  }
  return return_object
